sentence: El cielo no ye cllaro uei.
ipa: el ˈsjelo ˈno ˈʝe ˈkʎaɾo ˈwei
gloss_en: The sky is not clear today.
notes: Seseo ⟨c⟩ [s] 'cielo' (no /θ/, the diagnostic benasqués merger) and palatalising cluster ⟨cll⟩ [kʎ] 'cllaro' per saura_rami2003; copula 'ye' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Estos zapatos cuesten cuaranta euros.
ipa: ˈestos saˈpatos kweˈsten kwaˈɾanta ˈewɾos
gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Seseo ⟨z⟩ [s] and Ŏ>ue 'cuesten' per saura_rami2003; ⟨s⟩+voiced onset sandhi per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: La chent chira ta casa a la nuei.
ipa: la ˈtʃent ˈtʃiɾa ta ˈkasa a la ˈnwei
gloss_en: The people head home at night.
notes: Word-initial J-/Ge,i- > [tʃ] 'chent' (< GENTE), 'chira' (< GYRARE) — benasqués has no /x/ per saura_rami2003; -CT- > -it survives, seseo profile per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: El mío chirmá biu en la bila.
ipa: el ˈmio tʃiˈɾma ˈbju en la ˈbila
gloss_en: My brother lives in the town.
notes: Initial ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chirmá' and final-vowel apocope (Aragonese, not Catalan reduction) per saura_rami2003; 'bila' (town) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Bes de fren y tuerce en la primera carrera.
ipa: ˈbes de ˈfɾen ʝ ˈtweɾse en la pɾiˈmeɾa kaˈreɾa
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and turn at the first street.
notes: F- retained 'fren' and Ŏ>ue with seseo 'tuerce' [ˈtweɾse] per saura_rami2003; 'carrera' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: La carn d'aquell puesto ye estada bona.
ipa: la ˈkaɾn ð aˈkeʎ ˈpwesto ˈʝe eˈstaða ˈbona
gloss_en: The meat from that place has been good.
notes: Ŏ>ue 'puesto' and final-consonant/apocope 'carn','bona' per saura_rami2003; clitic ⟨d'⟩ elision per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Án ye la cllau?
ipa: ˈan ˈʝe la ˈkʎaw
gloss_en: Where is the key?
notes: Palatalising cluster ⟨cll⟩ [kʎ] 'cllau' (< CLAVE) and interrogative 'án' per saura_rami2003; benasqués transitional lexicon per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Cuántes presones bienen a cenar?
ipa: ˈkuantes pɾeˈsones bjeˈnen a seˈnaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Ĕ>ie 'bienen', seseo ⟨c⟩ [s] 'cenar' and Zone-A final -a > -e 'cuántes','presones' per saura_rami2003; count question per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Si yo podese, mercarba aquella casa.
ipa: si ˈʝo poˈðese meˈɾkaɾba aˈkeʎa ˈkasa
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy that house.
notes: Aragonese conditional -arba and 'mercar' per saura_rami2003; imperfect subjunctive 'podese' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Ahiere merqué cinco quilos de cereixas.
ipa: aˈjeɾe meˈɾke ˈsinko ˈkilos de seˈɾejʃas
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought five kilos of cherries.
notes: Seseo ⟨c⟩ [s] 'cinco' and ⟨ix⟩ [ʃ] 'cereixas' (no /θ/) per saura_rami2003; preterite 'merqué' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: L'añada que bien iré ta Benás.
ipa: ˈl aˈɲaða ke ˈbjen iˈɾe ta beˈnas
gloss_en: Next year I will go to Benasque.
notes: Palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'añada' and directional 'ta' per saura_rami2003; place-name 'Benás' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Truca-me cuan plegues ta casa.
ipa: ˈtɾuka me ˈkwan ˈpleɡes ta ˈkasa
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: 'trucar','plegar' [ˈpleɡes] and 'cuan' per saura_rami2003; ⟨gu⟩ [ɡ] before front vowel per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Buens diyes, cómo te ba?
ipa: ˈbwens diˈʝes ˈkomo te ˈba
gloss_en: Good morning, how are you?
notes: Ŏ>ue 'buens' and Zone-A final -a > -e 'diyes' per saura_rami2003; greeting register per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Més bal muixón en man que cient bolán.
ipa: ˈmes ˈbal mwiˈʃon en ˈman ke ˈsjent boˈlan
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth a hundred flying.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'muixón' (bird) and seseo ⟨c⟩ [s] 'cient' (hundred) per saura_rami2003; proverbial register per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: La muller biella pille l'agulla grisa.
ipa: la muˈʎeɾ ˈbjeʎa ˈpiʎe ˈl ˈaɡʎa ˈɡɾisa
gloss_en: The old woman picks up the grey needle.
notes: Palatal lateral ⟨ll⟩ [ʎ] preserved 'muller','biella','pille','agulla' (< initial L- and -LL-) and Ĕ>ie 'biella' per saura_rami2003; clitic ⟨l'⟩ per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: El can corre per la ribera del río.
ipa: el ˈkan ˈkore ˈpeɾ la riˈβeɾa ˈdel ˈrio
gloss_en: The dog runs along the riverbank.
notes: Trill ⟨rr⟩ [r] 'corre', word-initial [r] 'río' vs tap [ɾ] 'ribera' per saura_rami2003; article 'el','del' (benasqués paradigm) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Feito y güeit fan una uitena.
ipa: ˈfejto ʝ ˈɡweit ˈfan una wiˈtena
gloss_en: Done, and eight make a set of eight.
notes: F- retained 'feito' and -CT- > -it 'feito','güeit' — the Aragonese kernel kept in the transitional variety per saura_rami2003; numeral 'güeit' per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Plou y fa fret sobre la montaña.
ipa: ˈplou ʝ ˈfa ˈfɾet sobɾe la moˈntaɲa
gloss_en: It rains and it is cold over the mountain.
notes: Catalan-side 'plou' (rains, no diphthong), 'fa fret' (it is cold) and palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'montaña' — the Ésera-valley overlay per saura_rami2003; transitional lexicon per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: Chunt a la finestra i ha una flor.
ipa: ˈtʃunt a la fiˈnestɾa ˈi ˈa una ˈfloɾ
gloss_en: Beside the window there is a flower.
notes: Initial ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chunt' (< IUXTA) and 'finestra' (window) per saura_rami2003; existential 'i ha' (Catalan-type) per nagore_lain2001.

sentence: No crego que niebe sobre el tozal.
ipa: ˈno ˈkɾeɡo ke ˈnjeβe sobɾe el toˈsal
gloss_en: I do not think it will snow over the hill.
notes: Ĕ>ie 'niebe' and seseo ⟨z⟩ [s] 'tozal' (hill) per saura_rami2003; negation frame per nagore_lain2001.
